curation.synopsis: The Imperium is at war for its life, and on Terra the Council that must coordinate that defense is choking on its own procedure. Fabricator General Zagreus Kane's tech-priests are dismissed, talked past, and waved aside by the High Lords—a slight made sharper by the awkward fact that Kane's traitor predecessor Kelbor-Hal still sits on Mars, leaving the Mechanicum's loyalty technically contested. Ambassador Vethorel arrives in the corridors of the Imperial Palace with the unenviable task of negotiating a position of strength for the priesthood of the Machine God while her own delegation fractures around her. The fate of the war effort may turn less on a battlefield than on whether two halves of the Imperium can still hear one another speak.
